packages.name: vox-ars
packages.description: ARS (agent runtime shell): OpenClaw HTTP client, skill execution harness, context bundles

packages.name: vox-compiler
packages.description: Unified Vox compiler crate containing lexer, parser, AST, HIR, typechecker, and codegen.

packages.name: vox-repository
packages.description: Repository discovery, stable identity, layout probes, and agent scope helpers for external and internal Vox workspaces

packages.name: vox-bounded-fs
packages.description: UTF-8 file reads capped by vox-scaling-policy max_file_bytes_hint (shared across workspace crates).

packages.name: vox-scaling-policy
packages.description: Compile-time and runtime accessors for scaling SSOT (contracts/scaling/policy.yaml)

packages.name: vox-config
packages.description: Centralized configuration and env/default resolution for Vox tooling

packages.name: vox-clavis
packages.description: Central secret resolution and compatibility adapters for Vox.

packages.name: vox-socrates-policy
packages.description: Shared Socrates anti-hallucination confidence thresholds and risk classification

packages.name: vox-reqwest-defaults
packages.description: Shared reqwest ClientBuilder presets (user-agent, timeouts) for CLI, runtime, and AI transports.

packages.name: vox-skills
packages.description: Skill marketplace and plugin architecture for the Vox agent system

packages.name: vox-audio-ingress
packages.description: Minimal HTTP ingress for Oratio: /api/audio/status and /api/audio/transcribe (path-based + optional upload)

packages.name: vox-oratio
packages.description: Vox speech-to-text (Oratio) — Candle Whisper (Rust) STT and transcript refinement

packages.name: vox-bootstrap
packages.description: Host toolchain bootstrap and install plan (rustup, clang for Turso) — no Turso/vox-pm dependency

packages.name: vox-checksum-manifest
packages.description: SHA-256 release asset verification against checksums.txt manifests (shared by vox-cli and vox-bootstrap).

packages.name: vox-install-policy
packages.description: SSOT constants for Vox install/update surfaces (source path, release targets, default GitHub coordinates).

packages.name: vox-browser
packages.description: Chromium CDP automation backend for Vox (narrow session API over chromiumoxide)

packages.name: vox-capability-registry
packages.description: Transport-independent capability registry (YAML SSOT) + Mens chat tool descriptors

packages.name: vox-cli
packages.description: Vox command-line interface: compile, run, bundle, and workspace diagnostics.

packages.name: vox-container
packages.description: OCI container runtime abstraction for Vox — supports Docker and Podman

packages.name: vox-corpus
packages.description: Training data contracts, preflight, corpus SSOT, and Mens dataset metadata

packages.name: vox-mcp-meta
packages.description: Registries, taxonomy structs, and enums natively derived for Vox MCP and Corpus.

packages.name: vox-mcp-registry
packages.description: Compile-time MCP tool name/description registry from contracts YAML (SSOT)

packages.name: vox-doc-inventory
packages.description: Generate and verify docs/agents/doc-inventory.json (schema v3) without Python.

packages.name: vox-forge
packages.description: Platform-agnostic Git forge API for Vox — GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, Forgejo

packages.name: vox-git
packages.description: Pure-Rust Git bridge for Vox — bidirectional sync using gix (no C, no libgit2)

packages.name: vox-jsonschema-util
packages.description: Shared JSON Schema compile + validate helpers for CLI, contracts, and tooling.

packages.name: vox-ludus
packages.description: Gamification layer for Vox — companions, quests, battles, and free AI integration

packages.name: vox-openai-sse
packages.description: OpenAI-compat SSE line reassembly and chat completion delta extraction (runtime + Ludus shared).

packages.name: vox-orchestrator
packages.description: Multi-agent file-affinity queue system for coordinating concurrent AI coding agents

packages.name: vox-populi
packages.description: Vox Populi: multi-node worker registry, HTTP control plane, and Mens native ML (Burn / Candle QLoRA).

packages.name: vox-primitives
packages.description: Dependency-neutral id and backoff helpers shared across workspace crates.

packages.name: vox-publisher
packages.description: Unified news syndication and publishing for vox

packages.name: vox-openai-wire
packages.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions JSON types (non-streaming wire) shared across MCP and runtime.

packages.name: vox-search
packages.description: Shared local-first retrieval execution: memory hybrid, repo inventory, Codex chunks, policy, and optional lexical/vector backends

packages.name: vox-toestub
packages.description: AI code quality stub detector — finds stubs, magic values, empty bodies, missing references, and DRY violations

packages.name: vox-project-scaffold
packages.description: Shared Vox.toml + src/main.vox + skill scaffolding for vox init and MCP

packages.name: vox-workflow-runtime
packages.description: Interpreted workflow execution MVP (local + mens activity hooks)

packages.name: vox-dei
packages.description: Minimal DeI staging crate; Socrates policy floors only until legacy modules are rewired.

packages.name: vox-mcp
packages.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server exposing the Vox orchestrator to AI coding agents

packages.name: vox-schola
packages.description: vox-schola — standalone ML training/serving binary. Mens QLoRA links Candle CUDA kernels when built; use --no-default-features for a CPU-only check without nvcc.

packages.name: vox-scientia-api
packages.description: Scientia API surface helpers for CLI and MCP.

packages.name: vox-scientia-core
packages.description: Scientia core publication models, preflight, and worthiness APIs.

packages.name: vox-scientia-social
packages.description: Scientia social distribution adapters and syndication outcomes.

packages.name: vox-scientia-runtime
packages.description: Scientia runtime orchestration helpers.

packages.name: vox-tools
packages.description: In-process execution of a subset of Vox MCP tools (Mens chat direct executor)

packages.name: vox-webhook
packages.description: HTTP webhook gateway for the Vox agent system
